method: Loaded dwg_graph_ir.json, iterated d['block_definitions'] list (407 entries), matched each entry's 'name' field against regex ^\*D\d+$ using Python re.match, counted matches.
commands: import re; pat = re.compile(r'^\*D\d+$'); matches = [b['name'] for b in bd if pat.match(b.get('name',''))]; print(len(matches)); print(matches[:20])
